$comment: Validation targets are derivable from fixture paths (ADR-0004); this file carries that mapping as configuration, not code heuristics. Rules are matched in order against the fixture path relative to examples/ ('*' does not cross '/', '**' does; first match wins). Fixtures under an invalid/ directory MUST fail validation; everything else MUST pass. Schemas named without an 'api.' prefix are auto-discovered from schemas/*.schema.json — new schema files need no kit change, only fixture rules here once their examples/ area lands. The deployment/, faults/, capacity/, and fleet/ rules pre-seeded at SC-T008 became active unchanged when the SC-T006/SC-T007 fixtures landed (v0.2.0). Ordering note for fleet/: the four filename rules match in order (hardware-, model-, slo-, cost-), so fleet fixture filenames must not contain an earlier rule's prefix as a substring.

api_schemas.$comment: api.* schemas resolve into openapi/inference-api.yaml component schemas (JSON Schema 2020-12 dialect per ADR-0003). 'api.stream-event' is the per-SSE-event payload: oneOf chunk | error envelope.
